title: Gamorrean Rot
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gamorrean Rot''' was a [[Disease/Legends|disease]] that originated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. It eventually mutated to affect non-[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] races over [[Time/Legends|time]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-08-XX -->''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''
